messages.content:
write reply to this letter and mention that it is season of garden works here  Hi beautiful Liliya.
Great,we will be there at least 10 days.
Tell me what days are best for You,so I can start look hotel and flight.

I was yesterday on a gym.
Ecercise one hour on a crosstrainer.
Nothing problem on that.
Today I go training exercise cycle.
I can do things which feet do a fysical work.I think that I can run sooner what I though.

I can walk and stand normal.
Sit and rising must take slowly and carefully that torso doesn't move.

But nights are worse.I can sleep only other side,not even on my back.
And I can't control my moves when I sleep,so I will move and then it hurts.
So,I sleep only few hours on a night.
But I take a one hour nap about 2 - 3 times per day.

Sorry for the strike of Odessa.
My problems are small.
Your terrible situation is much much worse.

So,I really want that Our holiday come soon.You truly deserve that.

Mika

Photo of my yesterday training.

Dear Mika,

I'm so glad to hear that you will be visiting for at least 10 days! The best days for me would be from next Monday to the following Wednesday, if that works for you.

I'm sorry to hear about your sleeping difficulties and the pain you're experiencing, but I'm glad to hear that you're able to do some physical activity and that you're making progress with your recovery. Please take care of yourself and don't push yourself too hard.

I am also looking forward to our holiday together. It will be a much-needed break for both of us. 

Looking forward to seeing the photo of your training session!

Warm regards,
Liliya

write message from Liliya to a man , wish him to have a great sunday and ask his what have he done or plans to do ? Tell him that this sunday Maslenitza will be over , so it should be celebration and big fire to tell bye bye to winter .What is the nearest holiday they are going to have there ?Does he have the most favorite holiday ?What is it ?And why he likes it that much ?She likes Easter , because of cakes and eggs to color )))Make it super sweet letter

My Dearest [Man's Name],

I hope this message finds you well and happy on this beautiful Sunday. I just wanted to wish you a fantastic day filled with joy, relaxation, and maybe a little bit of excitement.

As Maslenitza will be coming to an end soon, I hope you are planning to celebrate with a big fire to bid farewell to winter. It's always such a special time to come together with loved ones and enjoy the festivities.

I was wondering, what is the nearest holiday you will be celebrating there? And do you have a favorite holiday that you absolutely love? I would love to know more about it and why it holds a special place in your heart.

Personally, I adore Easter because of the delicious cakes and the fun tradition of coloring eggs. It's such a cheerful and heartwarming holiday that brings everyone together. 

Sending you lots of love and warmth on this Sunday, and I can't wait to hear all about your plans and favorite holidays.

Take care and enjoy your day!

With all my affection,
Liliya

write message from olga to a man on the dating site , ask about how is his search going , wsh him awseome day ahead and ask him what is the thing that makes his morning be good ?meaning that if he has some ritual that he trys to never miss , like shower or coffee for example , or breakfast perhaps?

Hey there [Man's Name]!

I hope you're having a fantastic day as you're reading this. I was just wondering how your search on the dating site is going? Finding someone special can be quite the journey, but I have a good feeling that great things are in store for you.

I'm curious, what is the one thing that makes your morning extra special? Is there a certain ritual or routine that you always make sure to do to start your day off right? Whether it's a refreshing shower, a steaming cup of coffee, or a delicious breakfast, I would love to know what helps make your mornings so good.

Wishing you an awesome day ahead filled with positivity and good vibes. Can't wait to hear all about your morning routine!

Take care and talk soon!

Warm regards,
Olga
Write message from Nastya to a man and ask him if he thinks woman must be like a litten purring and sweet , or he prefers a tigress wild and unpredictable ?Or is it somewhere in between ?

Hey there [Man's Name],

I hope you're doing well! I have a fun question for you - when it comes to the ideal woman, do you prefer someone who is like a little kitten, purring and sweet, or would you rather have a tigress, wild and unpredictable? Or maybe you think the perfect balance lies somewhere in between? I'm really curious to know your thoughts on this.

Looking forward to hearing your perspective. 

Take care and have a great day!

Warm regards,
Nastya

write message from Annechka to her man she calls him bunny . wish him to have a super nice day a head . and also ask him if there is such a product which he might agree to eat every day ?For her that might be homebaked bread , she really loves crispy cover and soft inside yum yum , she thinks she could eat it everyday and won't get annoyed LOL

Hey my sweet Bunny,

Wishing you the most amazing and wonderful day ahead filled with joy and happiness. I hope every moment brings a smile to your face.

I've got a fun question for you - is there a particular food item that you could eat every single day without getting tired of it? For me, it would have to be homemade bread. I just can't resist that crispy crust and soft, warm interior - it's like a little piece of heaven every time. I could eat it every day and never grow tired of it, haha.

Can't wait to hear what your go-to daily food indulgence would be!

Sending you all my love and warm thoughts,

Annechka
Write message from Maya to a man on dating site and ask him what will he do if he will find himself in love with a girl from this dating site , what will be his next actions ?Does he have a plan ?

Hi there [Man's Name],

I hope you're having a wonderful day! I have a question that I've been curious about - if you were to find yourself falling in love with a girl from this dating site, what would your next steps be? Do you have a plan in mind for how you would approach this situation?

I believe that love can be such a beautiful and unexpected journey, and I'm interested to hear your thoughts on how you would navigate such a scenario.

Looking forward to hearing your perspective on this. 

Take care and have a lovely day!

Warm regards,
Maya

write message from tanya to her man , calling him Sugar Bun, and ask him if he likes her the dress on the photo or is it too revealing to his opinion ?is it too daring to wear at his city or will be fine ?Or shoudl she keep it for wearing at home for him ?

Hey Sugar Bun,

I hope you're doing great! I have a little fashion dilemma that I'd love your opinion on. I was wondering, what do you think of the dress in the photo - do you find it too revealing, or just the right amount of daring? Would it be too much to wear in your city, or do you think it would be fine?

I value your input and I'm curious to hear your thoughts on whether I should save it for wearing at home for you, or if it could be worn out. Your opinion means a lot to me!

Looking forward to hearing your stylish insights.

Sending you lots of love,

Tanya

write sweet reply to this letter please : hello ksenia. It is good to know that you are in good health and in a good mood. For some time I was worried. Many thoughts came to my mind. That you did not want to communicate with me any more. That maybe your parents found out you were communicating with some foreign man from Mexico and diapproved of our relationship. And that something bad happened to you. I heard in the news that harkov suffered an attack with drones and some people died. I also heard that a building collapsed and some more people died there. I was anguished. I took a deep breath when I received your letter. Do you remember that I told you I would like to buy new football shoes? Well, I did buy them. Not the expensive ones made out of expensive leather, but cheaper ones. They are nice, puma brand. I cannot wait to wear them and get on the football field. I will have to wait though. I hurt my leg last week shooting the ball, ja, ja, that is how things are some times. We have to be patient and enjoy life and being able to do the things we like when we have the chance. In two more weeks i will be ready I believe. For now, I am taking therapy, ice, warm clothes with hot water and anti-inflammatory. I will have a few days off at the end of the last week of lent. I do not have any plans to go anywhere yet. And I do not want to spend them alone. I will think on something.
Well, now you know what is my view on impulsive purchases. When something you buy makes you happy even though you might not really need it. It is good to do that once in a while. In fact, I encourage you to do so, and even if we were together I would give you the money to make that buy. If we are able to do it, if it is in our hands, why not make ourselves happy. Life is so short.
how are you feeling these days? are you working? Taxi cabs are working as usual in your city?
Take care, big hug
Miguel

Dear Miguel,

I was so touched to receive your letter and hear about all the worries that were on your mind. Please don't fret - I am safe and sound, and hearing from you brightened my day more than you can imagine.

I'm glad to hear that you bought the football shoes you were looking forward to, even if they weren't the expensive ones. The important thing is that they bring you joy and anticipation for getting back on the field. I hope your leg heals quickly and that you'll be back to playing in no time.

Your perspective on impulsive purchases truly resonates with me - it's so important to treat ourselves and find happiness in the little things. Your encouragement means the world to me, and I appreciate your thoughtfulness more than words can express.

I'm doing well these days, thank you for asking. Work keeps me busy, but I find moments of peace and joy in between. Taxi cabs are indeed working as usual here in my city.

Take care as well, and know that you're always in my thoughts. Sending you a big hug and looking forward to hearing from you again soon.

Warm regards,
Ksenia
write message from Tanya to her man asking him a playful wet foaming question  , Do you choose a shower or a bathtub? make it be sexy and funny letter

Hey there, 

I've got a cheeky question for you - when it comes to getting clean, do you prefer a steamy shower or a relaxing bath? There's something so sexy about the thought of you all lathered up and splashing around in the suds... 

Let me know your wet and foamy preference, and maybe we can make some bubbly plans together sometime soon. 

Can't wait to hear your sudsy thoughts!

Drop me a line when you're feeling bubbly,

Tanya
